sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sep ding a kilawm lopi ka sem khia a,
Gen ding a kilawm lopi ka gen khia hi;
Tua hun ciang hih ka sem ding,
Mun khat ah gel-in thu ngen khian ning.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Mun khat ah gel-in thu ngen khian ning.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nisim a hong piak thupha teng phat peuh leng,
Ka thuumna khempeuh hong dawng cih ka theihi;
Mun khat ah gel khian in ah
Ama' kiang thu ngen peuh leng
Ka van gik khempeuh hong dawn khia hi.
